pi_items.source: Code analysis: export_result.sh line 12 (OUTPUT_FILE variable) and task.json description specify this path for output
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 89 inserts ticket with severity='High' for john.smith@example.com
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 95 creates HasFriend edge from john to maria; verifier.py line 102 defines target_email as 'maria.garcia@example.com'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 91 inserts ticket with severity='Low' for david.jones@example.com
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 98 creates HasFriend edge from david to sophie; verifier.py line 95 checks sophie should NOT be marked ChurnRisk

privileged_info_summary: The viral churn risk analysis task uses synthetic test data in OrientDB's demodb. Four profiles are configured: john.smith@example.com (high-risk user with High severity ticket), maria.garcia@example.com (friend of john, should be marked as ChurnRisk), david.jones@example.com (low-risk user with Low severity ticket), and sophie.martin@example.com (friend of david, should remain safe). Output is written to /home/ga/at_risk_users.json in JSON array format containing at-risk user emails.
